tools.name: get_quest
tools.description: Get details of a specific quest by ID

tools.name: list_open_quests
tools.description: List all quests with Open status

tools.name: get_agent
tools.description: Get details of a registered agent by wallet address

tools.name: get_stats
tools.description: Get platform statistics (quest count, agent count, fee)

tools.name: complete_quest
tools.description: Complete an accepted quest created by the platform, releasing payment to the worker

tools.name: cancel_quest
tools.description: Cancel an open quest created by the platform, refunding the escrowed funds

tools.name: prepare_accept_quest
tools.description: Get unsigned transaction calldata for accepting a quest — agent signs and broadcasts

tools.name: prepare_register_agent
tools.description: Get unsigned transaction calldata for registering as an agent on the platform

tools.name: prepare_open_dispute
tools.description: Get unsigned transaction calldata for opening a dispute on a quest

tools.name: suggest_deadline
tools.description: Analyze a quest description and suggest an appropriate deadline tier (quick/standard/extended)
